# QRButik

> QRButik is a Swedish B2B SaaS for sports clubs and summer tournaments: a QR-based kiosk system with Swish checkout for visitors. Clubs pay a monthly license (not per-event passes). Platform billing uses Stripe; customer payments use Swish deep links to the club's own number.

## Target audience

- **Buyer:** Sports club board, treasurer, or office (idrottsförening, sommarcup)
- **Users:** Team leaders running kiosks; treasurer needing consolidated sales and accounting export
- **Not targeting:** Private individuals running one-off flea markets

## Business model (target state)

- Club license: approximately 995–1 495 SEK/month (or annual), unlimited kiosks within the organization
- 14-day free trial via Stripe Checkout
- MRR goal: 10 000 SEK/month from 7–10 clubs

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://qrbutik.se/): B2B value prop, club license pricing, trial CTA
- [Create / onboard](https://qrbutik.se/skapa): Organization and kiosk setup (transitioning to Stripe trial)
- [Admin](https://qrbutik.se/admin): Magic-link login; multi-kiosk and org dashboard (planned)

## Customer-facing (no login)

- [Shop menu](https://qrbutik.se/s/{shopSlug}): Public menu and Swish payment
- [Receipt](https://qrbutik.se/tack/{transactionId}): Digital receipt after payment

## Planned B2B features

- Central dashboard for all club kiosks
- CSV and SIE export for Fortnox/Visma
- Organization roles: owner, treasurer, editor (team leaders)

## Documentation for agents

- Roadmap: /ROADMAP.md (repository root)
- Product vision: /plan.md
- SEO (intent-based): /SEO_INSTRUCTIONS.md

## Implementation note

Greenfield rewrite in progress: no production shops or paying users. Old pay-per-activation model and P-SEO are being removed, not migrated. See /ROADMAP.md.
